name: ClearOne Advantage
description_short: ClearOne Advantage is a Baltimore-based debt settlement company founded in 2008. BBB A+ accredited since November 2024. Fees 18-29% of enrolled debt. 4.8 Trustpilot stars. 120 CFPB complaints. 4.5 Google rating from 4,907 reviews.
description_long:
ClearOne Advantage, LLC is a debt settlement company founded in 2008 and headquartered at the Broom Factory, 3500 Boston Street, Suite 413, Baltimore, Maryland 21224. The company specializes in negotiating reduced balances on unsecured consumer debts including credit cards, medical bills, and personal loans. ClearOne achieved BBB accreditation in November 2024 with an A+ rating at their Tempe, Arizona office location, and maintains a strong consumer review profile with 4.8 stars on Trustpilot from over 2,000 reviews and 4.5 stars on Google from nearly 5,000 reviews.

ClearOne's debt settlement process follows the industry-standard model: consumers enroll their unsecured debts (minimum typically $10,000), stop making payments to creditors, make monthly deposits into a dedicated escrow account managed by Global Client Solutions (GCS), and have ClearOne's Certified Debt Specialists negotiate lump-sum settlements for less than the full balance owed. The company advertises potential savings up to 50% on enrolled debts before fees. Fees range from 18-29% of total enrolled debt, which is on the higher end of the industry standard (15-25%). Additionally, GCS charges a monthly escrow maintenance fee of $8.35-$9.45. Under FTC regulation, all fees are charged only after a successful settlement is reached.

The company has 120 complaints in the CFPB database, which is moderate for a debt settlement company of this size. Common complaint themes include fee transparency, settlement timeline expectations, and communication during the creditor negotiation process. ClearOne distinguishes itself through extended customer service hours (9am-8pm EST weekdays), free initial consultations conducted by Certified Debt Specialists, and educational content about debt relief options. The company is licensed in multiple states with specific compliance pages for Maryland, Texas, Nevada, and California residents.

In the debt relief landscape, consumers should compare ClearOne against both settlement competitors and alternative approaches. National Debt Relief (BBB A+, 4.74/5 from 5,500+ BBB reviews) is the market leader with lower typical fees (15-25%). TurboDebt (BBB A+, 4.9 Google stars from 7,800+ reviews) offers similar settlement services. However, consumers should first evaluate whether debt settlement is necessary at all. Debt consolidation loans from credit unions or online lenders combine debts at lower interest without the credit damage of settlement. Credit counseling through nonprofit NFCC-member agencies provides free budgeting guidance and can enroll consumers in debt management plans at reduced interest rates. Credit monitoring services help track credit health throughout any repayment strategy. A debt payoff calculator can help consumers model whether settlement, consolidation, or accelerated direct repayment is most cost-effective for their situation. Consolidating high-interest balances into a single installment loan with a fixed rate can reduce total interest paid and simplify monthly budgeting.
address: Broom Factory, 3500 Boston St Suite 413, Baltimore, MD 21224

certifications: BBB A+ rating, accredited since November 2024
Fees 18-29% of enrolled debt (FTC-regulated, after settlement only)
Escrow managed by Global Client Solutions (GCS)
Licensed in multiple states (MD, TX, NV, CA and others)

pros: BBB A+ accredited since November 2024, demonstrating commitment to complaint resolution standards
Strong consumer review profile with 4.8 Trustpilot stars and 4.5 Google stars from nearly 5,000 reviews
Free initial consultation with Certified Debt Specialists before any commitment
Extended customer service hours (9am-8pm EST weekdays) for accessible support
FTC-regulated fee-after-settlement model means no upfront costs before results are delivered
Advertised potential savings up to 50% on enrolled debts before fees
Educational content and financial wellness tools included for enrolled clients
cons: Fees of 18-29% of enrolled debt are on the higher end of the industry standard (15-25%)
Additional escrow maintenance fee of $8.35-$9.45/month through Global Client Solutions adds to total cost
120 CFPB complaints indicate recurring consumer experience issues around fees and timelines
Debt settlement requires stopping creditor payments, causing serious and lasting credit score damage
No guarantee all creditors will agree to settle; some may pursue collection lawsuits
Program typically takes 24-48 months to complete, during which consumers carry delinquent account status
Forgiven debt may be taxable as income, creating unexpected tax liability
best_for: Consumers with $10,000+ in unsecured debt who are already behind on payments and in financial hardship
Those who have been declined for debt consolidation loans and cannot afford nonprofit DMP monthly payments
Individuals willing to accept 24-48 months of credit damage as a trade-off for potential 30-50% debt reduction
Consumers who value extended support hours and Certified Debt Specialist guidance during the settlement process
diagnosis: ClearOne Advantage is a solid mid-tier debt settlement provider with recent BBB A+ accreditation (Nov 2024), strong review profiles (4.8 Trustpilot, 4.5 Google), and 16 years of operating history since 2008. However, the 18-29% fee range is higher than competitors like National Debt Relief (15-25%), and the additional GCS escrow fees add up. The 120 CFPB complaints are moderate but worth noting. Best for consumers with $15K+ unsecured debt who prefer a provider with Certified Debt Specialists and extended support hours. Compare fee quotes against National Debt Relief and TurboDebt before committing.
services: Debt settlement and creditor negotiation for unsecured debts
Free personalized debt evaluation with Certified Debt Specialists
Dedicated escrow account through Global Client Solutions
Financial wellness tools and educational resources
Online account portal for program progress tracking
Customer service support (9am-8pm EST weekdays, weekend hours available)
State-specific compliance programs (MD, TX, NV, CA)

contact.address: Broom Factory, 3500 Boston St Suite 413, Baltimore, MD 21224
